title: koeleria × hungarica
intro: Koeleria × hungarica, also known as Hungarian false brome, is a hybrid grass species resulting from the cross between Koeleria macrantha and Bromus arvensis. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues. Koeleria × hungarica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, making it a potential natural remedy for certain health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
